mission.title: istio: Do not add pod to ipset if we have a "partial failure" adding to the dataplane.
mission.description:
**Please provide a description of this PR:**

Should fix: https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/52218 (@howardjohn repro'd locally)

Basically, when we "add" a pod to the mesh, there are several things that (in order) can fail.

1. We can fail to get the pod netns.
2. We can fail to inject iptables
3. We can fail to talk to ztunnel
4. We can fail to annotate the pod (which officially indicates to the Istio CP that the pod is "in  ambient")
5. We can fail to add the pod to the hostipset, so healt

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
Applying: If pod enrollment fails in any way, do not add to ipset
Using index info to reconstruct a base tree...
M	cni/pkg/nodeagent/net.go
M	cni/pkg/nodeagent/server.go
Falling back to patching base and 3-way merge...
Auto-merging cni/pkg/nodeagent/server.go
Auto-merging cni/pkg/nodeagent/net.go
CONFLICT (content): Merge conflict in cni/pkg/nodeagent/net.go
error: Failed to merge in the changes.
hint: Use 'git am --show-current-patch=diff' to see the failed patch
Patch failed at 0001 If pod enr
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/istio/istio/pull/52329. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.
